mads.note: For date of birth and death, see p. 36 in a) and p. 31 in b): a) Yamane Yasushi 山根泰志. “Tofurō zukan” to Minomushi sanjin『都府楼図巻』と蓑虫山人 [Tofuro-Zukan and Minomushi Sanjin]. Kyūshū daigaku fuzoku toshokan kenkyū kaihatsushitsu nenpō 九州大学附属図書館研究開発室年報 [Kyushu University Library, Research and Development Division Annual Report] (2020/2021) (2021), 35-66. https://catalog.lib.kyushu-u.ac.jp/opac_download_md/4486539/02_p35_yamane.pdf b) Fukuoka-ken kyōiku iinkai 福岡県教育委員会. Fukuoka-ken bunkazai hogo gyōsei no 100-nen: Dazaifu shiseki shitei 100-nen kinenshi 福岡県文化財保護行政の100年：大宰府史跡指定100年記念誌 [The 100 Years of Administrative Preservation of Cultural Heritage in Fukuoka Prefecture: Anniversary Edition Commemorating the 100th Year of Dazaifu Being Declared a Historic Site]. Fukuoka: Fukuoka-ken kyōiku iinkai 福岡県教育委員会, 2021.
